---
title: "Customized Quarto Website"
author: "Shalini Harwalkar"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    css: slides.css
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    center: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
---

## 👩‍💻 My Quarto Website

### Built with Quarto and customized with CSS

- Personal **About** page
- Embedded **Resume**
- **Project analysis** page with Python visualization

---

## ✨ What I Customized

- Added custom colors, typography, and layout styling
- Built a personal About page with profile links
- Embedded my resume directly into the site
- Created a project page with data visualization and interpretation

---

## 🚀 Key Takeaways

This project shows how Quarto can be used to create both a **professional website** and a **RevealJS presentation**.

### Demo Highlights
- About page
- Resume page
- Project page

**Thank you!**
